items.promptRawJa: Que faut-il faire en cas d'accident qui nécessite l'intervention des secours ?
items.promptGlossEn: What should you do in case of an accident that requires emergency assistance?

B contacter la police tout de suite et s'arrêter pour observer
C protéger le lieu et contacter la police
D passer vite et ne pas intervenir

Secure the scene and contact the police
Drive past quickly and do not intervene

drive past quickly and must-not intervene

topCandidates.translatedPrompt: 도로에서 차량이 고장 나 수리·정비를 위해 정차해야 할 때, 운전자가 취해야 할 조치는?

options.text: stop in the middle of the road
stop the vehicle where it will not interfere with traffic
turn on the low beam lights or fog lights
stop on the spot to solve the problem
options.translatedText: 그 자리에서 즉시 문제를 해결하기 위해 정차한다.

correctAnswer.correctOptionText: stop the vehicle where it will not interfere with traffic

topCandidates.prompt: When finding a vehicle in the opposite direction having difficulty to go forward and needing to borrow road while crossing each other, the driver should ________.
topCandidates.syntheticJaPrompt: when finding 車両 opposite direction having difficulty go and needing borrow road crossing each other 運転者 べき ________。
topCandidates.translatedPrompt: 반대편 차량이 진행에 곤란하여 서로 길을 빌려 통과해야 할 경우 운전자는 어떻게 해야 하는가?

options.text: not occupy the road of the other side and should go forward normally
options.translatedText: 상대편 차로를 점유하지 않고 정상적으로 진행한다

options.text: indicate the other side to stop and yield
speed up and go forward by the right side
yield to the other side as much as possible

correctAnswer.correctOptionText: yield to the other side as much as possible
